title: pimpinella diversifolia var. stolonifera
intro: Pimpinella diversifolia var. stolonifera, also known as Chinese chervil or Chinese burnet, is a perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid digestion and relieve symptoms of fever, cough, and sore throat. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. Pimpinella diversifolia var. stolonifera can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese cooking as a flavorful garnish.
